Package org.eventb.ui.prover

Class TacticProviderUtils

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.ui.prover.TacticProviderUtils
public class TacticProviderUtils extends Object
Utility class intended to give convenient facilities to tactic provider contributors.
Since:
1.1

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static List<ITacticApplication>
    adaptPositionsToApplications(Predicate hyp, Predicate predicate, Function<Predicate,List<IPosition>> positionsSupplier, BiFunction<Predicate,IPosition,ITacticApplication> applicationBuilder)
    Adapt a function generating a list of positions to generate tactic applications.
    static org.eclipse.swt.graphics.Point
    getOperatorPosition(Predicate predicate, String predStr, IPosition position)
    A default method to get an operator position.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

  • Method Details

    • getOperatorPosition

      public static org.eclipse.swt.graphics.Point getOperatorPosition(Predicate predicate, String predStr, IPosition position)
      A default method to get an operator position. Intended to be used by implementors of IPositionApplication.getHyperlinkBounds(String, Predicate). Most of the times, it is easier to extend DefaultTacticProvider.DefaultPositionApplication rather than implementing the interface and using this method to implement getHyperlinkBounds().
      Parameters:
      predicate - the predicate where a position is desired
      predStr - the string representation of the predicate
      position - the position of the operator in the predicate
      Returns:
      a Point with x (inclusive) and y (exclusive) as operator position

    • adaptPositionsToApplications

      public static List<ITacticApplication> adaptPositionsToApplications(Predicate hyp, Predicate predicate, Function<Predicate,List<IPosition>> positionsSupplier, BiFunction<Predicate,IPosition,ITacticApplication> applicationBuilder)
      Adapt a function generating a list of positions to generate tactic applications.
      Parameters:
      hyp - hypothesis used or null if applied to the goal
      predicate - predicate on which positions are generated (either hyp or the goal)
      positionsSupplier - function generating the positions for the predicate
      applicationBuilder - build a tactic application from hyp and a given position
      Returns:
      list of generated tactic applications
      Since:
      3.7
